items.description: where i'm currently at for Big Boy projects: - sol ultra to plan - fable 5 to critique - sonnet 5/terra ultra/swe 1.7 to ultracode/slop cannon - devin review to review (using kakuna) ~always use a variant of @mattpocockuk's grill-me or @tr…

items.title: @resend AGAIN.

items.title: .@nikitabier is it possible to find accounts that just instantly reply to posts from bigg…
items.title_zh: .@nikitabier 是否可以找到立即回复 bigg 帖子的帐户...
items.description: .@nikitabier is it possible to find accounts that just instantly reply to posts from bigger accounts? Those are usually AI bots worth banning? I block a bunch every week.
items.description_zh: .@nikitabier 是否有可能找到可以立即回复大帐户帖子的帐户？这些通常是值得禁止的人工智能机器人？我每周都会屏蔽一堆。

items.title: At the risk of losing friends: Singlethreads: Flowers on sushi?
items.title_zh: 冒着失去朋友的风险：单线程：寿司上的花？
items.description: At the risk of losing friends: Singlethreads: Flowers on sushi? Benu: Thousand year egg I can buy from Chinese grocery store Californios: Ok this was good but I had better food in Mexico Birdsong: I remember this one fondly when they had 1…
items.description_zh: 冒着失去朋友的风险：单线程：寿司上的花？ Benu：我可以从中国杂货店买千年鸡蛋 Californios：好吧，这很好，但我在墨西哥吃过更好的食物 Birdsong：我深情地记得这个，当时他们有 1 个……

items.title: This makes artifacts much more expressive and can be combined in creative ways.
items.title_zh: 这使得工件更具表现力，并且可以以创造性的方式组合。
items.description: This makes artifacts much more expressive and can be combined in creative ways. One of my favorites is to create a dashboard for a project in Claude Tag that can be edited by others or by my local Claude Code sessions. https://t.co/xud1a7M…
items.description_zh: 这使得工件更具表现力，并且可以以创造性的方式组合。我最喜欢的事情之一是在 Claude Tag 中为项目创建一个仪表板，可以由其他人或我本地的 Claude Code 会话进行编辑。 https://t.co/xud1a7M…

items.title: Getting realtime progress updates on my model training runs.
items.title_zh: 获取模型训练运行的实时进度更新。
